description: If-then product recommendation rules for the TidyAI Laundry Hacks feature. The AI matches a stain context (stain class, fabric type, user preference) against the rules below to surface the right product set. Compiled from US-market research across Reddit, Amazon, Trustpilot, manufacturer pages, Wirecutter, Good Housekeeping, and ingredient analysis.

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Protease enzymes break the peptide bonds in proteins. Cold water keeps proteins soluble; hot cooks them in permanently.

products.primary: Persil ProClean Original Liquid (5 enzymes: protease, amylase, cellulase, mannanase, pectate lyase)
products.specialty: Carbona Stain Devils #4 (Blood, Dairy, Ice Cream, Glue)
products.baby_variant: OxiClean Baby Stain Remover; Dreft Stain Remover
products.sheet_eco: Kind Laundry (enzymes); White Hack sheets (light wear only)
products.diy_fallback: Cold rinse → Dawn blue + 3% hydrogen peroxide paste (whites only)

stain_chemistry.white_hack_fit: good for light/everyday traces; NOT for set protein stains

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Pet urine contains uric acid crystals that re-activate with humidity. Only enzyme cleaners with uricase break them down.

products.primary: Rocco & Roxie Stain & Odor Eliminator
products.cult_favorite: Nature's Miracle Advanced Stain & Odor Remover
products.carpet_specific: Folex Instant Carpet Spot Remover (after enzyme soak)

stain_chemistry.white_hack_fit: NOT suitable — needs pet-specific enzyme cleaner

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Lipase enzymes break down fats. Dawn dish soap emulsifies cooking grease. Hot water helps oil release.

products.primary: Dawn Ultra Blue dish soap (~$3)
products.enzyme_detergent: Persil ProClean Powder OR Tide Original Powder (powder has more lipase)
products.workwear: Tide Plus Febreze Sport Odor Defense
products.set_sebum_collar: Whink Color-Safe Iron Out + OxiClean overnight soak + sun-bleach
products.diy_fallback: Baking soda or cornstarch absorber, then Dawn pre-treat

stain_chemistry.white_hack_fit: good for light food grease; switch to Persil Powder or Lestoil for heavy grease

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Oxygen bleach (sodium percarbonate) attacks the chromophore. Cold rinse first; vinegar acidifies the stain to lift dye.

products.primary: OxiClean Versatile Stain Remover powder (cold soak 30 min–overnight)
products.coffee_tea_specific: Carbona Stain Devils #8 (Coffee, Tea, Wine & Juice)
products.premium_delicate: The Laundress Wine & Coffee Stain Bar (~$16)
products.sheet_eco: White Hack sheets (light everyday tannin); Kind Laundry
products.diy_fallback: Cold rinse → Dawn + 3% hydrogen peroxide paste (whites only); club soda for fresh

stain_chemistry.white_hack_fit: good for light everyday tannin on shirts/cuffs; heavy or 24h+ tannin needs OxiClean soak

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Alcohol dissolves ink carriers. Amodex has specialized surfactants. Carbona Color Run Remover rebinds free dye.

products.primary: Amodex Ink & Stain Remover (gentler than alcohol, more fabric-safe)
products.hair_dye: OxiClean overnight + hydrogen peroxide on whites; Iron Out for last-resort
products.color_catcher_prevention: Shout Color Catcher Sheets (one per mixed-color load)
products.sheet_eco: Kind Laundry; White Hack (dye-free, won't compound the problem)
products.diy_fallback: Old-formula hairspray with high alcohol content

avoid: hot water until ink is gone

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Oxalic acid (Whink) dissolves iron oxide. Citric acid (lemon) works gently. Vinegar descales calcium.

products.primary: Whink Rust Stain Remover (hydrofluoric acid — wear gloves)
products.color_safe: Whink Color-Safe Iron Out; Iron Out spray gel
products.hard_water_descaler: White vinegar (1 cup in rinse); CLR Calcium Lime Rust (test fabric)
products.in_wash_softener: Calgon Water Softener Powder; Charlie's Soap Booster
products.diy_fallback: Lemon juice + salt + direct sun, 1–2 hours

avoid: tumble dry before stain is gone
stain_chemistry.white_hack_fit: won't dissolve rust — pre-treat with Whink, then any detergent including White Hack

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Vinegar's acidity kills mildew organisms. Oxygen bleach lifts the stain. Sun-drying destroys remaining spores.

products.primary: 1 cup white vinegar + warm water 1-hour soak → hot wash with Persil ProClean + 1/2 cup OxiClean → sun-dry
products.heavy_mildew: OxiClean Tough Stain Remover Powder + hot wash; repeat
products.washer_machine: Affresh Washing Machine Cleaner; Tide Washing Machine Cleaner

avoid: mixing chlorine bleach with vinegar (toxic gas)

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Avobenzone-iron oxidation or aluminum-protein bonding. Standard detergent doesn't touch it.

products.primary_3_step: (1) Dawn 10 min; (2) Whink Color-Safe Iron Out + OxiClean hot overnight soak; (3) Persil Powder hot wash + sun-bleach
products.spa_day_method: KismaiAesthetics approach: lipase detergent + oxygen bleach in hot water 4–12 hours
products.sheet_eco: Not for set stains — use multi-step then White Hack going forward to prevent recurrence

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Sugar dissolves in water. Freezing makes gum brittle. Rubbing alcohol dissolves polymer adhesives.

products.gum: Freeze 15 min with ice → scrape → 91% rubbing alcohol → Dawn
products.tree_sap: Freeze → scrape → 91% rubbing alcohol or Goo Gone → Dawn + warm wash
products.school_glue: Warm water soak 30 min → Dawn + warm wash
products.super_glue: Acetone only (test fabric first — destroys acetate/rayon/modacrylic)
products.adhesive_residue: Goo Gone (or peanut butter DIY) → Dawn + warm wash
products.sheet_eco: Any detergent after physical removal; White Hack works for final wash

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Heat melts wax into a paper-bag absorber. Dawn handles the residual oil.

products.primary_method: Freeze 30 min → scrape solid → brown paper bag + warm iron (no steam) → Dawn → Persil warm wash
products.crayon_in_dryer: Re-wash whole load with Lestoil + Dawn + OxiClean hot, 2–3 cycles
products.sheet_eco: Any detergent after wax removed; White Hack works

avoid: tumble drying wax onto a full load

stain_chemistry.why_it_works: Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) and sodium thiosulfate reduce iodine to colorless iodide. Bleach creates a PERMANENT brown oxidized mark.

products.primary: 2 × 500mg Vitamin C tablets crushed in 1/2 cup warm water, dab and repeat
products.commercial: Betadine Stain Remover (Bruce Medical); Spartan Clothesline Fresh Iodine & Betadine Remover S5
products.lab_grade: Sodium thiosulfate (1 tbsp in 1 cup water)

stain_chemistry.avoid_critical: CHLORINE BLEACH — creates a permanent brown oxidized mark

fabric_specific.why_it_works: Protein fibers are damaged by alkalinity, chlorine, hot water. Need pH-neutral detergent with no enzymes that attack keratin.

products.primary: The Laundress Wool & Cashmere Shampoo
products.diy_backup: Cool water + a few drops of baby shampoo

fabric_specific.white_hack_fit: milder than name brands but not optimal for true silk/cashmere; use for silky synthetic blends only

fabric_specific.why_it_works: Synthetic fibers trap bacteria differently. Sport detergents strip standard-detergent residue and target the lipid layer.

products.primary: WIN Sports Detergent
products.brand_name: Tide Plus Febreze Sport Odor Defense
products.sheet_eco: White Hack for everyday; switch to WIN or HEX for set gym funk

fabric_specific.why_it_works: Dye-magnets absorb free dye particles. Fewer brightening agents means less dye oxidation.

products.primary: Woolite Darks Defense Liquid

fabric_specific.why_it_matters: Acetone DISSOLVES these fibers. Many stain removers can destroy them.

products.primary: Persil ProClean Sensitive; Tide Free & Gentle; White Hack

fabric_specific.never_use: acetone, pure nail polish remover, lacquer thinner
fabric_specific.white_hack_fit: excellent — mild plant surfactants are safe for these fibers

fabric_specific.why_it_works: Strip buildup + skip softener prevents bacterial buildup that causes sour smell.

products.primary: Persil ProClean OR Tide Original Powder
products.strip_buildup: Bathtub soak: 1/4 cup borax + 1/4 cup washing soda + 1/2 cup powdered detergent, 4–5 hours
products.rinse_helper: 1/4 cup white vinegar in rinse cycle every wash
products.sheet_eco: White Hack; Kind Laundry (no residue softener-heavy detergents leave)

fabric_specific.avoid_critical: Fabric softener — #1 cause of musty towels

fabric_specific.why_it_works: Indigo dye washes out under high pH or hot water. Cold + gentle + dye-magnet preserves color.

products.primary: Woolite Darks Defense; Cheer

fabric_specific.vintage_tip: Wash denim inside out, cold water, every 5–10 wears (per Levi's)

products.primary: All Free Clear (#1 dermatologist-recommended; NEA Seal)
products.strong_alt: Tide Free & Gentle (NEA Seal + NPF Seal)
products.cleanest_ingredients: Branch Basics All-Purpose Concentrate (MADE SAFE certified)
products.sheet_eco: White Hack Fragrance Free; Kind Laundry Fragrance Free

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: strong — fragrance-free SKU explicitly designed for this

products.primary: Seventh Generation Free & Clear Liquid (Parents magazine top pick)
products.sheet_eco: White Hack Fragrance Free; Kind Laundry Fragrance Free (EWG verified, Mom's Choice)

avoid: strong fragrances on infants under 6 months

products.primary: Tide Original Powder (workhorse, all water types)

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: NOT recommended — needs heavier workhorse like Tide Powder

products.hard_water_specific: Charlie's Soap Powder + Charlie's Soap Booster
products.add_in_softener: Calgon Water Softener Powder; 1 cup white vinegar in rinse; 2 tbsp citric acid
products.sheets: White Hack (dissolves cleanly in hard water) + Calgon

avoid: liquid detergent with no booster in very hard water

products.sheets: White Hack; Kind Laundry; Earth Breeze; Tru Earth; HeySunday; Blueland
products.liquid_eco: Seventh Generation Free & Clear; Mrs. Meyer's Clean Day; Method; Ecos

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: among the cleanest sheet options on US market

products.primary: White Hack sheets; Kind Laundry travel-size packs (6 loads each); Earth Breeze travel samples
products.single_use_packets: Tide Travel Sink Packets; Persil Pods
products.diy_backup: Single detergent sheet in a hotel sink

avoid: PVA pods in cool sink water
use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: strong — the sheet format was designed exactly for travel

products.primary: OxiClean White Revive (40% better than chlorine bleach per OxiClean)
products.detergent_with_brightening: Persil ProClean; Tide Plus Bleach Alternative

avoid: tumble dry with set yellow stains
use_case_situational.white_hack_note: won't whiten dingy whites alone — pre-treat with OxiClean then use White Hack daily

products.any_HE_labeled: Persil ProClean HE; Tide HE Turbo Clean; All HE Free Clear
products.sheets: White Hack (HE-compatible); Kind Laundry; Earth Breeze; Tru Earth
products.powders: Tide Original Powder; Persil ProClean Powder
products.pods: Tide Pods; Persil Discs; Method Pods; Dropps

use_case_situational.avoid: non-HE liquid at full dose (excess suds)

products.detergent: All Free Clear; Tide Free & Gentle; Seventh Generation Free & Clear; Persil ProClean Sensitive Skin
products.sheets: White Hack Fragrance Free; Kind Laundry Fragrance Free; Earth Breeze Fragrance Free
products.premium: Branch Basics; The Laundress Stain Solution Unscented

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: strong — fragrance-free SKU is a brand pillar

products.pre_treater: Lestoil OR Krud Kutter Original Cleaner/Degreaser
products.wash: Tide Plus Heavy Duty Hygienic Clean

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: NOT suitable — too mild for mechanic-level grease

products.pre_treater: Dawn dish soap rubbed in 10 min
products.soak: OxiClean + hot water 4–12 hours (KismaiAesthetics spa day)
products.going_forward: White Hack or Kind Laundry as daily wash to prevent re-buildup

products.machine_quick: Persil ProClean on short cycle + warm water
products.sheet_fast: White Hack (dissolves quickly in any temp)

products.primary: OdorKlenz Laundry Additive (mineral, no masking fragrance)
products.specialty_detergent: Persil ProClean Odor Fighter; Tide Odor Rescue
products.pre_soak: 1 cup white vinegar + cool water 1 hour

use_case_situational.white_hack_fit: not for set smoke odor — pair OdorKlenz + vinegar + White Hack for final wash

powder: Arm & Hammer Plus OxiClean Deep Clean

great_for: everyday/light food grease on regular wear
dark or black clothes (dye-free, no brightening agents)
not_for: pet urine, vomit, feces, spray (needs pet enzyme)
set yellow aluminum underarm stains (needs Iron Out + OxiClean)
real silk or cashmere (needs Laundress / Eucalan)
mechanic-level grease (needs Lestoil or Krud Kutter)
white_hack_summary.brand_narrative: Use White Hack for ~80% of laundry (daily wear, dress shirts post-pre-treatment, sensitive skin, baby, dark colors, travel). Keep one bottle of OxiClean, one box of Tide Powder, and one bottle of pet enzyme cleaner for the heavy-duty 20%.
